2604.15679.title: Hierarchical Active Inference using Successor Representations
2604.15679.paper_summary: Active inference, a neurally-inspired model for inferring actions based on the free energy principle (FEP), has been proposed as a unifying framework for understanding perception, action, and learning in the brain. Active inference has previously been used to model ecologically important tasks such as navigation and planning, but scaling it to solve complex large-scale problems in real-world environments has remained a challenge. Inspired by the existence of multi-scale hierarchical representations in the brain, we propose a model for planning of actions based on hierarchical active inference. Our approach combines a hierarchical model of the environment with successor representations for efficient planning. We present results demonstrating (1) how lower-level successor representations can be used to learn higher-level abstract states, (2) how planning based on active inference at the lower-level can be used to bootstrap and learn higher-level abstract actions, and (3) how these learned higher-level abstract states and actions can facilitate efficient planning. We illustrate the performance of the approach on several planning and reinforcement learning (RL) problems including a variant of the well-known four rooms task, a key-based navigation task, a partially observable planning problem, the Mountain Car problem, and PointMaze, a family of navigation tasks with continuous state and action spaces. Our results represent, to our knowledge, the first application of learned hierarchical state and action abstractions to active inference in FEP-based theories of brain function.
2604.15679.paper_summary_zh: 主動推理，一種基於自由能原則（FEP）推斷行動的神經啟發模型，已被提出作為理解大腦中感知、行動和學習的統一框架。主動推理之前已被用來建模生態上重要的任務，如導航和規劃，但將其擴展到解決現實世界中複雜的大規模問題仍然是一個挑戰。受到大腦中多尺度層級表示存在的啟發，我們提出了一種基於層級主動推理的行動規劃模型。我們的方法將環境的層級模型與後繼表示結合，以實現高效的規劃。我們展示了結果，證明了（1）如何使用較低層級的後繼表示來學習較高層級的抽象狀態，（2）如何基於較低層級的主動推理進行規劃，以啟動和學習較高層級的抽象行動，以及（3）這些學習到的較高層級抽象狀態和行動如何促進高效的規劃。我們在幾個規劃和強化學習（RL）問題上展示了該方法的性能，包括著名的四房間任務變體、一個基於鑰匙的導航任務、一個部分可觀察的規劃問題、山地車問題，以及PointMaze，一系列具有連續狀態和行動空間的導航任務。據我們所知，我們的結果代表了學習到的層級狀態和行動抽象首次應用於基於FEP的大腦功能理論中的主動推理。
2604.15679.author: Prashant Rangarajan et.al.
2604.15679.authors: Prashant Rangarajan, Rajesh P. N. Rao
